title: Subtle Tweaks
description: Fully configurable, client-side QoL features to improve everyday gameplay
body:
# Subtle Tweaks

Subtle Tweaks is a lightweight, client-side quality-of-life mod that adds a collection of small but meaningful improvements to everyday gameplay. Every feature is toggleable and most are customisable, so you only keep what you actually want.

## Features
- **Block Preview:** See exactly where, and in what orientation, stairs, slabs, walls, and fences will be placed before placing them.
- **Right-Click Harvest:** Right-click fully grown crops to harvest & replant them instantly. _Note: toggling this feature requires a world rejoin to take effect. Vanilla server compatibility may vary_. Sneak + right click to harvest a 3x3 area (toggleable).
- **Growth Stage HUD:** Shows a progress bar and number indicator when looking at a crop to let you know how far through growing it is.
- **Inventory Count:** When hovering your mouse cursor over an item or stack of items in your inventory, a 'Total: ' message will be shown when multiple instances/stacks of that item are present in your inventory.
- **Auto Collect Leads:** Leads go straight into your inventory rather than dropping on the ground.
- **Auto Run:** Press a key (default: R) while moving to keep moving in that direction automatically.
- **Compass HUD:** Shows a highly customisable compass display.
- **Coordinate HUD:** Shows a display of your current coordinates.
- **Overworld ↔ Nether Coordinate HUDs:** Automatically shows your equivalent X and Z coordinates in the other dimension. _Note: may display incorrect coordinates when used with certain mods (e.g. Immersive Portals). May display coordinates that are slightly off_.
- **Clock HUD:** Shows the time of day next to your hotbar. Cave Awareness is an option that hides the clock and only displays it when you're likely underground (customisable Y-level, default: 55).
- **Velocity HUD:** Shows your current speed in m/s.
- **Fall Damage HUD:** When crouching at the edge of a ledge, the fall damage you would take from falling is shown.

All features are toggleable, and most are customisable. I highly recommend you check out the config after installing!

## Dependencies
Subtle Tweaks requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), as well as [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

## Modpacks
Feel free to include Subtle Tweaks in modpacks, but please provide attribution and a link back to this page!

## Other Versions & Loaders
Subtle Tweaks is currently available for Fabric. I am looking into 1.20.1 and 1.21.11 versions, and plan to explore supporting other loaders such as Forge and NeoForge in the future.

## Feedback, Suggestions & Bug Reporting
Got an idea for a feature, found a bug, or just have some feedback? Let me know on the [Issues](https://github.com/raife-wh/subtletweaks/issues) page or start a [Discussion](https://github.com/raife-wh/subtletweaks/discussions) — I'd love to know how I can improve Subtle Tweaks!
